title: I don't believe it! — новые слова

items.example: She never says hello when I see her.
You should say sorry for being late.

items.translation: говорить то, что имеешь в виду
items.example: Just say what you mean instead of talking around the issue.
My father always told us stories before bed.
Most comedians tell jokes, but his face alone makes you laugh.
He told a white lie to avoid hurting her feelings.
It's better to tell the truth than to lie.
Sometimes it's better to tell a white lie than to upset someone.
The guilty hand: when lying, people use less hand movement.
